description_long: This house features a symmetrical brick facade with large, multi-pane windows and white trim, surrounded by a manicured lawn and tall hedges for privacy. The structure is two stories tall, with a flat roof and a central entryway that includes a small porch and steps leading up to the main door. The backyard includes a wooden pergola, garden beds, and a paved patio area, while the front has a driveway with a parked car and additional landscaping. The windows are arranged in neat, horizontal rows, giving the house a balanced and orderly appearance. The exterior materials appear to be primarily brick, wood, and glass, with some metal and concrete elements visible in the fencing and driveway. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern influences, with clean lines and classic proportions.
description: A two-story brick house with symmetrical windows, white trim, and a flat roof, surrounded by hedges, gardens, and a driveway. The design blends Colonial and modern elements, featuring a central entryway and landscaped outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with symmetrical windows, central entryway, and a large backyard with a pergola and garden beds.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side of the house is visible, showing the tall hedges, side garden, and a wooden trellis structure.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the backyard, including the pergola, patio, and additional landscaping, as well as the back windows and doors.
description_view_3: This perspective focuses on the driveway, front yard, and main entrance, with a car parked and more detailed landscaping visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, small porch, white door, and decorative trim
